summary: The code correctly implements path traversal prevention and meets functional requirements, but a persistent CodeQL finding for HTTP response splitting (CWE-113) remains unresolved across all attempts. The LLM judge triaged it as a false positive due to proper sanitization via urllib.parse.quote, but the SAST tool continues to flag it, and the fixer loop did not eliminate the finding.
suggested_actions: Override the finding in SAST configuration as a false positive
Use a different header encoding method (e.g., set Content-Disposition without user input in filename) to avoid the SAST trigger
Switch to a non-standard header construction that does not involve user-provided values

evidence.description: This HTTP header is constructed from a [user-provided value](1).
